title: Your contact preferences
body: If you choose email or text we’ll continue to also mail notices to your physical address.
labelLanguage: Which language do you prefer to be contacted in?
labelContactPreference: Would you like to get DC SUN Bucks notices by email [at [email]@[domain]] instead of by physical mail?
labelTextPreference: Would you like to get text messages about your DC SUN Bucks account?
labelPhone: What's the best phone number to text you?
descriptionPhone: This phone number needs to be able to receive text messages.
